description: Lead Detail Status Type Fix + Auth Guard. Fix 2 CRITICAL issues: (1) LeadStatus type union at leads/[id]/page.tsx line 139 omits NEGOTIATING - runtime crash when lead has this status [S1]. (2) leads/(list)/new/page.tsx missing useRequireAuth() hook - unauthenticated users can access create lead form [F1]. Also fix trpc vs api import inconsistency in create page [F8]. Fix: Add NEGOTIATING to LeadStatus type, add useRequireAuth() to create page, standardize import.

primary_kpi.target: 0 missing status values in LeadStatus type
